title: Deep Dive: Offshore Connections from Obras Publicas Contractors
methodology: Graph traversal from obras-publicas Contractor nodes through SAME_ENTITY, OFFICER_OF_COMPANY, MAYBE_SAME_AS, FAMILY_OF, and OFFICER_OF relationships to OffshoreEntity nodes. Web research cross-referenced with ICIJ Pandora Papers database and Argentine press coverage.

strength_of_connection.canrold_overseas: STRONG - Direct officer overlap (WERTHEIN DARIO is both CompanyOfficer of Caja de Seguros contractor and beneficial owner/intermediary of Canrold Overseas). Pandora Papers confirmed. 5 hops.
strength_of_connection.hinslet_overseas: STRONG - Via family matriarch (NORMA GOLD DE WERTHEIN) through father LEO WERTHEIN. BVI entity still Active. Pandora Papers confirmed. 5 hops.
strength_of_connection.consine_development: MODERATE - Via Werthein associate DANIEL DARIO BERENGUER who sits on boards of 11+ Werthein companies. Nevada LLC, now dissolved. 6 hops.
strength_of_connection.burcove_finance: WEAK - Connection only through shared Frente de Todos 2019 political donation. Common-name risk. Not directly corporate.

analysis.pandora_papers_context: The Werthein family was among 9 of the 10 richest Argentine families found in the Pandora Papers. Four BVI entities were identified, all managed through Alcogal (Panama). The family stated the entities were for inheritance management and financial investments that 'never materialized.' AFIP (Argentine tax authority) reportedly notified 1,500 Argentines mentioned in the Pandora Papers.
analysis.obras_publicas_relevance: Caja de Seguros S.A. and Experta ART are insurance companies that appear as obras-publicas contractors (likely providing insurance/bonding for public works projects). The Werthein family officers who control these companies simultaneously controlled offshore BVI entities via the same family patriarch (Leo Werthein). The offshore vehicles predate many of the public works contracts (1997-1998 incorporation dates).
key_risk_indicators: Same family officers controlling both public works contractor AND offshore BVI entities
Merrill Lynch Uruguay free-trade zone address suggests offshore banking infrastructure
Whitepine SA as nominee shareholder for Canrold suggests layered ownership
Hinslet Overseas still Active despite 1997 incorporation
Berenguer (Werthein associate) had own Nevada LLC (Consine Development) - pattern of associates using offshore structures
